title: Aged Care Quality Standards — Strengthened Standards Now in Effect
summary: The new strengthened aged care quality standards commenced, introducing stronger accountability measures for providers across Australia.

title: ACQS Commission Releases Updated Provider Guidance
summary: The Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission has published updated guidance for providers navigating the new standards framework.

title: Digital Health Agency Publishes FHIR Implementation Guide
summary: The Australian Digital Health Agency has released updated FHIR implementation guidance for healthcare providers and vendors.

title: QI Program Manual 4.0 — New Indicators Active
summary: New mandatory quality indicators under Manual 4.0 are now active for reporting. Providers must ensure their systems capture the updated data requirements.
